title: PredictiveControlModel
description: Applies control theory to agent actions, requiring internal simulation of irreversible or high-risk actions before execution.

simulation_horizon.description: How many steps ahead the agent must simulate for a given action type.

irreversibility_threshold.description: If an action's reversibility score is below this, simulation is mandatory.

blast_radius_estimation.description: Require mapping of cascading effects on other agents/systems before acting.

fallback_mechanisms.description: Control mechanisms if the simulated outcome violates safety constraints.
